4Lɛ bakatsitsi avitaʋa ni tiene ba ani bidɔgbagbe tune ʋe bɛdɔ kesea, lɛ besumu Aya, gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ. Lɛ bɛkpɛ ozi lo si,
“Amen, Haleluya!”
5Lɛ ole eyi dɔni likusigbo le su si,
“Mlakpɔ̀ blɔ Aya,
mlɔ yɛ banɔsumu ba petee,
mlɔ banama gi mlezeese ye e,
mlɔ banuvɔ ni betsitsi.”
6Lɛ menu ole ɔtɔ ŋwisi linɔkpi ʋidi itɔ ile, ŋwisi inipe glegle kuni kinɛ ɛ, ani ŋwisi dzeni kugugu gagla kinɛ gi bɛkpɛ ozi lo si,
“Haleluya!
Lɛ ese linu si Ɔkaɛ, blɔ Aya kigaglaɛ petee onete ɛɛŋa kukusi yo.
7Mlaki tɔ kumɔ isami tɔ kuyo,
tɔ mlaki yɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀!
Lɛ ese linu si keʋesibi ya ka kudzɛgbanɔɔ lipoe le lina,
lɛ yɛ ɔdzɛɛ gi atrágbanɔ ɛ alulɔ yɛ isu ya aki lɛ.
8Lɛ bɛki yɛ aklala pititi
gi eeŋle si ɔkpɛ ɛ.” Aklala pititi yɛ onu banɔdradra ba eboe gyɔgyɔ la gi bɛbitɛ ɛ.
9Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ asi mɛ si, “Ŋwlimi si, ‘Biakrira banama gi bɛxwa si ba ba Keʋesibi ya ka kudzɛgbanɔɔ ɔdɔŋakplɔ nɔ su i!’ ” Lɛ apɔnɔ dzɛ si, “Eboa la ya enu Aya yɛ anukwarɛɛ eboe.”
10Gi menu nite e, madɔ kesea ní yɛ ikli lɛ onu, tɔ misumu ye. Pɔ̀ asi mɛ si, “Wukíbitɛ lɛ ɛ! wɔ ɔhanuglɔ ɔnɔsumu menu, wɔ ni wɔ benemi ba gi mlevu Yesu yɛ katsalia mɛ ni awla ɛ. Sù Aya! Lɛ ese linu si anukwarɛ liɛ gi Yesu abasɛ ɛ, bɛ binu kidiliɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔ, gi eeze ní beboedoplɛ ba mɛ, ebu ibasɛ ɛ.”
Isɔ pititi yɛ ɔkpɛkpɛɛ
11Lɛ mamɔ lifunu ne gi lidra edu u, lɛ mamɔ isɔ pititi ɔtɔ, gi yɛ ɔkpɛkpɛɛ yɛ bizɛxwa si Anukwarɛɛ onete ni ɔnɔ aʋa gi biaziŋa ɛ. Izɛxwa litsi, lɛ izɛta kigũ ní kude gyɔgyɔ aʋa. 12Yɛ bimbi ʋe bilɛ ŋwisi kifu gi kiisɔ gaglaa kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ekume ekusikuto glegle ní yɛ litukpo le. Bɛŋwlimi linyi itɔ ní yɛ su gi ɔnɔnɔ óte sani yɛ ɔtutɔ ko o. 13Akpɛ liwu gi bɛkpɛ ní ika lɛ mɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ linyi ne linu si, Aya yɛ liboe le. 14Lɛ lifunu ne baguta ba lihakpɔ lɛ gi bɛkpɛ isɔ pitititi ʋa ɛ, balɛ ni yɛ kude, lɛ bɛkpɛ aklala pititi ewu gi la su ɛɛdra a, xe eeŋle e. 15Lɛ dɔni yɛ onugu lo me e, ihɛ inugu tiʋa izeedo gi yɛ izɛɛkɔ ɛɛŋa kuseo aʋa a. “Lɛ aaŋa amade na aʋa ni ɔwla gagla.” Yɛ izɛɛka wain yɛ ní Aya kigaglaɛ petee onetee yɛ kusuyeʋi gaglaa, kɔ wain yɛ ɔkaklɔ. 16Lɛ ni yɛ liwu le ni yɛ litagba nɛ su i, bɛŋwlimi linyii nɛ ya; BEKUSI BA AƲA OKUSI NI Baka Ba aʋa Ɔka!
17Lɛ mamɔ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ tole ɔtɔ gi ɔlɛɛ ní liwo le me e, lɛ akpɛ ozi ni ole gaglaa atsisi kudzɔʋi yɔ petee gi kuze pruru u, ní liwɔ lɛ mɛ si, “Mlakpɛ isu likpɔ kí Aya yɛ ɔkplɔ ʋidi lo, 18atɔ mlaata bekusi ba, ni baguta ba baka ba, banɔ ʋidi ba, isɔ ʋa, ni ba bakpɛkpɛ ba, banima petee, banama gi balɛ ba isuwla mɛ ni banama gi benu banɔ dzidzi i, banɔ bɔtsɔbɔtsɔ ani banɔ gbɔgbɔ ba kigyaɛ.”
19Lɛ mamɔ ɔŋuga yɛ ni kesea aʋa bekusi ba ani ba baguta ba gi bɛkpɛ isu likpɔ ɔ, si bɛta kigũ ni ɔniliɛ klɔ gi ɔlɛ ní isɔɛ aʋa a ani yɛ baguta ba. 20Pɔ̀ bevu ɔŋuga yɛ ni asia na oboedoplɛɛ, gi yɛ azaabitɛ inugutseboe la ní yɛ onu i. Gani eboa la ya elu me e, emeni banama gi bɛzɛ ɔŋuga yɛ lixaŋu kpɛkpɛ lɛ ɛ, xe bɛkpɛ litukpo kese ɛki yɛ litugu ne e. Bɛkɔ ba bagbagbe tiaʋa ba ɛŋwia ɛkpɛ ní lifuha lɛ gi liisɔ ni kifu yɛ akla na mɛ ɛ. 21Lɛ bɛkɔ ihɛ gblamadza yɛ gi izedo edɔni ɔniliɛ klɔ gi ɛɛkpɛ isɔɛ yɛ onugu lo me e, bɛkɔ yɛ eye banɔ gɔgɔ ba ɛ, lɛ kudzɔʋi yɔ petee kwizɛɛta ba kigyɛ.

english_text:
The Thousand Years
1I saw an angel come down from heaven, carrying the key to the deep pit and a big chain. 2 He chained the dragon for 1,000 years. It is that old snake, who is also known as the devil and Satan. 3Then the angel threw the dragon into the pit. He locked and sealed it, so 1,000 years would go by before the dragon could fool the nations again. But after that, it would have to be set free for a little while.
4 I saw thrones, and sitting on those thrones were the ones who had been given the right to judge. I also saw the souls of the people who had their heads cut off because they had told about Jesus and preached God's message. They were the same ones who had not worshiped the beast or the idol, and they had refused to let its mark be put on their foreheads or hands. They will come to life and rule with Christ for 1,000 years.
5-6These people are the first to be raised to life, and they are especially blessed and holy. The second death has no power over them. They will be priests for God and Christ and will rule with them for 1,000 years.
No other dead people were raised to life until 1,000 years later.
Satan Is Defeated
7At the end of the 1,000 years, Satan will be set free. 8 He will fool the countries of Gog and Magog, which are at the far ends of the earth, and their people will follow him into battle. They will have as many followers as there are grains of sand along the beach, 9and they will march all the way across the earth. They will surround the camp of God's people and the city God loves. But fire will come down from heaven and destroy the whole army. 10Then the devil who fooled them will be thrown into the lake of fire and burning sulfur. He will be there with the beast and the false prophet, and they will be in pain day and night forever and ever.
The Judgment at the Great White Throne
11 I saw a great white throne with someone sitting on it. Earth and heaven tried to run away, but there was no place for them to go. 12 I also saw all the dead people standing in front of that throne. Every one of them was there, no matter who they had once been. Several books were opened, and then the book of life was opened. The dead were judged by what those books said they had done.
13The sea gave up the dead people who were in it, and death and its kingdom also gave up their dead. Then everyone was judged by what they had done. 14Afterwards, death and its kingdom were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death. 15Anyone whose name wasn't written in the book of life was thrown into the lake of fire.
translation_text:
Bɛkpɛ Ozimizi ye Bibɔ Agɔ Akpe Tole
1Lɛ mamɔ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ ɔtɔ gi eeple dɔni lifunu ne e, gi evu lizokpo gluglu le lɛ safi ye ni bibɔɛ ʋɛ gi bizɛɛkpɛ banima ɛ, biʋidiitɔ ní awla la. 2Evu keni ya mɛ ɔgblaga ʋidi ye, ɔgblaga kokoe, gi onu Ozimizi ye loo Satana ɛ, lɛ anya yɛ kɔki agɔ akpe tole e. 3Lɛ aŋwia yɛ akpɛ ní lizokpo gluglu le me e, xe ada bidɔ mɛ ní lɛ onu i, lɛ asamu lɛ aʋa ɛ, atɔ okímeni kelea mɛ banima tɔ ɔ, kɔna ni lipoe lɛ klɔ gi agɔ akpe tole la onu ɛɛza ɛ, pɔ̀ lɛ ya kede e, lilɛ si, biable yɛ lipoe kpekpemi itɔ ko o.
4Lɛ mamɔ ekusigbo gi banama a, gi bɛki kigagla si baxwa etsi la ɛ, ba bedi ní la aʋa. Lɛ mamɔ banama onu gi bɛti etukpo la kɔkpɛ Yesu yɛ katsalia kuŋaŋaa ani kɔkpɛ Aya yɛ liboe le loso e, ba esobo la. Ba benu banama gi bésu ɔŋuga yɛ loo yɛ etugu na a, lɛ bázɛ yɛ lixaŋu kpɛkpɛ lɛ ní ba kutu yo loo ní ba kuwlakpɔɔ ɔ. Bedzi ligbã́ lɛ bɛŋa kukusi yo ni Kristo agɔ akpe tole. 5Banama gi betse e bédzi ligbã́ tɔɔ, kɔna ni lipoe lɛ gi agɔ akpe tole la ɛza ɛ. Lɛ ya linu kuyɔyɔ tɔpu yɔ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ. 6Banɔ gi bɛkrira ni banɔ dradra ba benu banama gi biamɔ ba kapɛa ní kuyɔyɔ tɔpu yɔ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ̀ mɛ ɛ. Kutse ʋla kutrámɔ kigagla ní ba aʋa a, boŋu i, biadzi Aya ni Kristo yɛ kusɔliɔ kɔ baka ba, lɛ biaŋa kukusi yo ni yɛ kɔki agɔ akpe tole.
Bɛŋa Satana aʋa
7Lɛ xe agɔ akpe tole la onu ɛza ɛ, biabu Satana ní yɛ lizokpo gluglu le me, 8lɛ aatrɛ, tɔ yizeemeni kelea petee, dɔni kesea igó tine ne aʋa a, gi inu, Gog ani Magog, tɔ biakpɛ ba likpɔ ki kigũ. Ba gi ba kisrɛsrɛ mɛ kiaze ŋwisi axuta la siklami sɛ kinɛ ɛ. 9Bɛga klani kesea petee lɛ bɛkpɛ Aya yɛ banima ba likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ ni yɛ ɔma ʋidi lo gi alɔ ni kusi yo e. Pɔ̀ kifu yɛ kidɔ ní lifunu ne lɛ kiba ɛkani ba ɛ. 10Lɛ bevu Ozimizi ye gi yɛ emeni ba ɛ, ɛŋwia ɛkpɛ ní lifuha ɛlɛ gi liisɔ mɛ ɛ. Niklɔ gi bɛŋwia ɔŋuga yɛ ni asia na oboedoplɛɛ ɛkpɛ ɛ, lɛ biawa ba nyɔnyɔɛ elesi ni kemize tsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ ɛ.
Aya axwa litsi ni bekpo ʋa
11Lɛ mamɔ likusigbo pititi ʋidi itɔ ni ɔniliɛ gi odi ní lɛ aʋa ɛ. Lifune ni kesea bise ní yɛ aŋu na mɛ, lɛ bámɔ ʋɛ tɔ ɔ. 12Lɛ mamɔ bekpo ʋa, banɔtsitsi ni banuvɔ, gi balɛ ní likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ ɛ, lɛ bɛdra kuplekpaa ɛ. Lɛ bɛdra keplekpa dzedze gi ka kenu ligbã nɛ keplekpaa. Lɛ bɛxwa litsi ni bekpo ʋa ní kidiliɛ gi bɛŋwlimi i kpɛ ní kuplekpa liɔ klɔ mɛ ní ba axwɛwawa la su u. 13Lɛ axu la ebú banama ma gi bɛwɔ ní la mɛ ɛkɔ, lɛ kutseo ni bekpo ʋa mɛ kyɛ bebu banama gi balɛ ní bɛ mɛ ɛkɔ ɔ, lɛ bɛxwa litsi ni ɔnɔ kakaa ní kidiliɛ gi abitɛ ɛ onu. 14Lɛ bɛkɔ kutseo ni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛŋwia ɛkpɛ ní lifuha lɛ mɛ ɛ. Lifuha ɛlɛ ya linu kutse ʋlaa. 15Lɛ xegi báŋwlimi ɔnutɔ yɛ linyi ne akpɛ ní ligbã́ nɛ keplekpaa mɛ ɛ, kɔ bɛŋwia yɛ ɛkpɛ ní lifuha lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_text:
The New Heaven and the New Earth
1 I saw a new heaven and a new earth. The first heaven and the first earth had disappeared, and so had the sea. 2 Then I saw New Jerusalem, the holy city, coming down from God in heaven. It was like a bride dressed in her wedding gown and ready to meet her husband.
3 I heard a loud voice shout from the throne:
God's home is now with his people. He will live with them, and they will be his own. Yes, God will make his home among his people. 4 He will wipe all tears from their eyes, and there will be no more death, suffering, crying, or pain. These things of the past are gone forever.
5Then the one sitting on the throne said:
I am making everything new. Write down what I have said. My words are true and can be trusted. 6 Everything is finished! I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will freely give water from the life-giving fountain to everyone who is thirsty. 7 All who win the victory will be given these blessings. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
8But I will tell you what will happen to cowards and to everyone who is unfaithful or dirty-minded or who murders or is sexually immoral or uses witchcraft or worships idols or tells lies. They will be thrown into that lake of fire and burning sulfur. This is the second death.
The New Jerusalem
9I saw one of the seven angels who had the bowls filled with the seven last terrible troubles. The angel came to me and said, “Come on! I will show you the one who will be the bride and wife of the Lamb.” 10 Then with the help of the Spirit, he took me to the top of a very high mountain. There he showed me the holy city of Jerusalem coming down from God in heaven.
11The glory of God made the city bright. It was dazzling and crystal clear like a precious jasper stone. 12 The city had a high and thick wall with twelve gates, and each one of them was guarded by an angel. On each of the gates was written the name of one of the twelve tribes of Israel. 13Three of these gates were on the east, three were on the north, three more were on the south, and the other three were on the west. 14The city was built on twelve foundation stones. On each of the stones was written the name of one of the Lamb's twelve apostles.
15 The angel who spoke to me had a gold measuring stick to measure the city and its gates and its walls. 16The city was shaped like a cube, because it was just as high as it was wide. When the angel measured the city, it was about 2,400 kilometers high and 2,400 kilometers wide. 17Then the angel measured the wall, and by our measurements it was about 60 meters high.
18 The wall was built of jasper, and the city was made of pure gold, clear as crystal. 19Each of the twelve foundations was a precious stone. The first was jasper, the second was sapphire, the third was agate, the fourth was emerald, 20the fifth was onyx, the sixth was carnelian, the seventh was chrysolite, the eighth was beryl, the ninth was topaz, the tenth was chrysoprase, the eleventh was jacinth, and the twelfth was amethyst. 21Each of the twelve gates was a solid pearl. The streets of the city were made of pure gold, clear as crystal.
22I did not see a temple there. The Lord God All-Powerful and the Lamb were its temple. 23 And the city did not need the sun or the moon. The glory of God was shining on it, and the Lamb was its light.
24 Nations will walk by the light of that city, and kings will bring their riches there. 25 Its gates are always open during the day, and night never comes. 26The glorious treasures of nations will be brought into the city. 27 But nothing unworthy will be allowed to enter. No one who is dirty-minded or who tells lies will be there. Only those whose names are written in the Lamb's book of life will be in the city.
translation_text:
Yerusalem vuvu yɛ
1Lɛ mamɔ lifunu vuvu ni kese vuvu, lɛ ese linu si lifunu tɔpu nɛ ni kese tɔpu ya bɛ onu biza, lɛ axu la amá tɔɔ ɔ. 2Lɛ mamɔ ɔma dradra nɔ gi onu Yerusalem vuvu yɛ, gi eeple dɔni lifunu ne ní Aya klɔ ɛ, lɛ bɛlulɔ lɔ ŋwisi ɔdzɛ, gi bɛbitɛ kublabla ɛkɔ ki yenye kinɛ ɛ. 3Lɛ menu ole gagla ɔtɔ ɛdɔni likusigbo le su si “Abla ɛ, Aya yɛ ozeklɔ ɔlɛ ní banima kusi lɛ yɛ aaze ní basu. Biaze yɛ banɔ, lɛ Aya ɔtutɔ lɔ aaze ní ba su lɛ aaze ba Aya. 4Lɛ aatsoli kube kakaa kube ni ba aŋu mɛ. Kutse loo awowoe la kuwawa loo kubemi loo kuyeʋiyeʋi kútraze tɔɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si eboe kokoo la ɛɛza.”
5Lɛ ɔniliɛ gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ, asi mɛ si, “Mɛɛbitɛ kidɔ kakaa si kidzi kivuvu u!” Lɛ apani si, “Ŋwlimi liboe lɛ ya plɛ, lɛ ese linu si eboe ala ya enu anukwarɛ eboe ni eboe gi biazɛ la aʋa ŋa a.”
6Lɛ asi mɛ si, “Bɛbitɛ lɛ pɔ́! Mɛ menu Alfa ni Omega, gi lɛ ese linu si okpese klɔ ni ɔgù klɔ. Ɔniliɛ gi olile eeku i, maaki yɛ tɔ aaŋwɛ kuni liʋɛmotsa dɔni ligba nɛ kuni yo kɔ linitɔ lɛ mɛ ɛ. 7Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, aazɛ kaŋase alia ya, lɛ maaze yɛ Aya, lɛ yɛ aaze mobi i. 8Pɔ̀ befufluse ba ni banama gi báziŋa a ani banama gi bizɛbitɛ anyaniboe la a, bakpɛnɛ ba, banama gi bizɛbitɛ ádzɛboe la ni enyimeboe la a, banama gi bizɛɛbitɛ ehwiboe la a, banama gi bizeesumu babu ʋa a, kɔpɔni basia nɛ ma petee ba ozeklɔ onu lifuha lɛ gi liisɔ ni kifu yɛ akla na a mɛ. Lɛ ya linu kutse ʋlaa a.”
9Lɛ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ tiegloele ba, gi ba awla kubɔziʋi tugloeleo o, gi kwiyi ní baxixa tiegloele gɔgɔ ʋa ba mɛ tole aba, lɛ apani nì mɛ si, “Ba, tɔ mibasɛ wɔ ɔdzɛɛ gi bɛkpɛ kuwlawlaa gi onu Keʋesibi ya yedze e.” 10Lɛ efeke me ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ atsini lito ʋidi gyɔgyɔ ɛtɔ aʋa ɛ, lɛ ebu ɔma dradra nɔ, Yerusalem, gi eeple dɔni lifunu ne ní Aya klɔ ɛ, abasɛ mɛ. 11Eekle ni Aya yɛ kusudraa, lɛ lɔ kuklekleo kulɛ ŋwisi líhuiʋi zi kedziatɔ kinɛ ɛ, ŋwisi yaspis likla, gi lɛ mɛ lidra ŋwisi azinzi kinɛ ɛ. 12Ligli gyɔgyɔ ʋidi itɔ liklani lɔ, lɛ kuvunu liɔfɔ ni tuʋa kulɛ ní lɔ su, lɛ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ liɔfɔ ni tiaʋa balɛɛ ní lɔ kuvunu yo o. Bɛŋwlimi Israɛl bebi ʋa ba iku liɔfɔ ni tiʋa lɛ enyina ní lɔ kuvunu yo. 13Kuvunu tuta kulɛ ní kewetu ya kapɛa, tuta ni kaʋaa, tuta ní kalaa ni tuta ní keweku ya. 14Ɔma ʋidi no lɔ egli la alɛɛ ní ixɔ liɔfɔ ni tiʋa aʋa, lɛ ni ixɔ liɔfɔ ni tiʋa lɛ aʋa ɛ, bɛŋwlimi Keʋesibi ya ka banɔkpɛkpɛ liɔfɔ ni tiaʋa ba enyi na ɛtrɔ ɔ.
15Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ liɛ gi apani ni mɛ ɛ, evu sika kigyigyeseʋi gi atrákɔ egyigyi ɔma ʋidi no ni lɔ kuvunu yo ni lɔ egli la a. 16Ɔma nɔ lɔ kidzedzee me ni lɔ kinenee me bisɔ̀. Egyigyi ɔma nɔ nì kigyigyeseʋi ye lɛ bize itiplɛkɔ akpe tole ni alafa tietsu; lɔ kidzedzee me ni kinenee me ani lɔ kimumu ye me bisɔ. 17Lɛ egyigyi ɔma nɔ lɔ ligli le, lɛ amɔ si lɛ kitritri ye me e, kize kuklikpɔ alafa tiaʋa ní ɔnɔ kugyigyi yo onu, gi kɔsu axwɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ ɛɛwa ɛ. 18Lɛ kidiliɛ gi bɛkɔ ɛtrɔ ligli le e, kinu yaspis likla, lɛ ɔma nɔ onu sika dradra yɛ, gi yɛ mɛ adra ŋwisi azinzi yɛ kinɛ ɛ. 19Lɛ bɛkɔ akla zikedzi ede ede dzedze la, ɛkɔ ɛlulɔ ɔma nɔ lɔ ɔxɔ lɔ, gi lɔ aʋa egli la alɛ ɛ. Ɔxɔ kpɛkpɛ tɔpu nɔ onu yaspis, ɔʋla lɔ onu safir, ɔtanɛ nɔ onu xalkedon, onene no onu smaragd, 20otsunɛ nɔ onu sardonik, oglonɛ nɔ onu kanelia, ogloele lo onu krisolit, ɔgɔtɔʋa yɛ onu beril, ɔgɔtolee onu topas, liɔfɔɛ onu krisopras, liɔfɔ ni tolee onu hiakint, liɔfɔ ni ɔʋlaɛ onu ametis. 21Lɛ kuvunu liɔfɔ ni tuʋa kunu ehuʋi pititi liɔfɔ ni taʋa, kevunu kakaa kenu lihuʋi pititi tile, lɛ ɔma nɔ ablɔ ʋa ɛ, benu sika gbã yɛ gi yɛ mɛ adra ŋwisi azinzi mɛ kinɛ ɛ.
22Lɛ mámɔ lisɔligba ɛ tɔtɔ ní lɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si Ɔka Aya, kigaglaɛ petee onetee ni Keʋesibi ya ba benu ba lisɔligba lɛ. 23Lɛ ɔma nɔ ɔ́ziã liwo le loo ɔdzidzi yɛ, tɔ aakle ɔbali ní lɔ aʋa, lɛ ese linu si Aya yɛ kusudraa kuzɛɛki lɔ kuklekle o, lɛ Keʋesibi ya kenu lɔ kani yɛ. 24Lɛ kesea aʋa banima biaga ní lɔ kuklekleo onu u, lɛ kesea aʋa bekusi ba biakɔ ba exo la ni ba kusudraa mani lɔ mɛ ɛ. 25Lɛ batráda lɔ ipupo le liwewe lɛ ese linu si kele kátrablo ní niklɔ ɔ, 26Kesea aʋa banima biamani ba exo la ni ba kubùbù yo ní lɔ mɛ. 27Lɛ kidɔkakaa gi kɛsu kídra ɛ, kítrati iku ní lɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ ɔnɔ gi izɛɛbitɛ anyaniboe loo izɛɛsɛ asia kyɛ ɔ́trátiiku isani banama tètè gi ba enyi na akpasi ní Keʋesibi ya ka ligbã́ nɛ keplekpaa mɛ ɛ.

english_text:
1 The angel showed me a river that was crystal clear, and its waters gave life. The river came from the throne where God and the Lamb were seated. 2 Then it flowed down the middle of the city's main street. On each side of the river are trees that grow a different kind of fruit each month of the year. The fruit gives life, and the leaves are used as medicine to heal the nations.
3 God's curse will no longer be on the people of that city. He and the Lamb will be seated there on their thrones, and its people will worship God 4 and will see him face to face. God's name will be written on the foreheads of the people. 5 Never again will night appear, and no one who lives there will ever need a lamp or the sun. The Lord God will be their light, and they will rule forever.
The Coming of Christ
6Then I was told:
These words are true and can be trusted. The Lord God controls the spirits of his prophets, and he is the one who sent his angel to show his servants what must happen very soon. 7Remember, I am coming soon! God will bless everyone who pays attention to the message of this book.
8My name is John, and I am the one who heard and saw these things. Then after I had heard and seen all this, I knelt down and began to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown it to me.
9But the angel said,
Don't do that! I am a servant, just like you. I am the same as a follower or a prophet or anyone else who obeys what is written in this book. God is the one you should worship.
10Don't keep the prophecies in this book a secret. These things will happen soon.
11 Evil people will keep on being evil, and everyone who is dirty-minded will still be dirty-minded. But good people will keep on doing right, and God's people will always be holy.
12 Then I was told:
I am coming soon! And when I come, I will reward everyone for what they have done. 13 I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
14 God will bless all who have washed their robes. They will each have the right to eat fruit from the tree that gives life, and they can enter the gates of the city. 15But outside the city will be dogs, witches, immoral people, murderers, idol worshipers, and everyone who loves to tell lies and do wrong.
16 I am Jesus! And I am the one who sent my angel to tell all of you these things for the churches. I am David's Great Descendant, and I am also the bright morning star.
17 The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!”
Everyone who hears this should say, “Come!”
If you are thirsty, come! If you want life-giving water, come and take it. It's free!
18 Here is my warning for everyone who hears the prophecies in this book:
If you add anything to them, God will make you suffer all the terrible troubles written in this book. 19If you take anything away from these prophecies, God will not let you have part in the life-giving tree and in the holy city described in this book.
20The one who has spoken these things says, “I am coming soon!”
So, Lord Jesus, please come soon!
21I pray that the Lord Jesus will be kind to all of you.
translation_text:
Aya yɛ onipe ɔlɔ gi izɛki ligba nɛ ɛ
1Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ abasi mɛ onipe gi lɔ kuni yo kuzɛɛkɔ ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, gi ɛɛtsi kifu yɛ ŋwisi azinzi kinɛ ɛ, gi ɛɛkpɛ dɔni Aya ni Keʋesibi ya ba likusigbo le su i. 2Lɛ ɛɛkpɛ ɛza ni ɔma ʋidi no lɔ ablɔ ʋidi ye yɛ kusio e. Lɛ ní onipe lo ige tiʋa lɛ aʋa ɛ, ligbã́ nɛ ose lo ɔlɛɛ, gi izeeyo lɔ esebi la eyo liɔfɔ ni taʋa ligɔ kakaa, tule ni ɔdzidzi kakaa mɛ ɛ. Lɛ ose lo lɔ awlakpa la ɛ, enu kuwa gi kwiaki amade na petee e aayɔ dɔni ba bànya ʋa mɛ. 3Lɛ ifixoxo etɔ́tɔ itráze tɔɔ ɔ, lɛ Aya ni Keʋesibi ya ba likusigbo le liaze ní ɔma ʋidi no me e, lɛ yɛ banɔsumu ba biasumu ye. 4Biamɔ yɛ aŋu na mɛ, lɛ yɛ linyi ne liaze ní ba kutu yo. 5Kele katráblo tɔɔ, lɛ batrázia kani kuklekle loo liwo le kuklekleo tɔɔ, lɛ ese linu si Ɔkaɛ Aya aaki ba kuklekle o. Lɛ biaŋa kukusi yo dɔni kanɔmɛ tsinɔ kanɔmɛ ɛ.
6Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ asi mɛ si, “Eboa la ya ɛ, enu eboe aʋa gi biazɛ ŋa a, lɛ enu anukwarɛ eboe. Lɛ Ɔkaɛ Aya, gi yɛ izɛki yɛ beboedoplɛ ba yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛ, yɛ akpɛ yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ tɔ obu eboa la gi ɛtrába la mɛ kpekpemii basɛ yɛ banɔsumu ba a.”
Yesu atrába
7“Dike, matraba kpekpemi i! Biakrira ɔniliɛ gi evu keplekpaa lia ya mɛ eboedoplɛ la ní awla ɛ.”
8Mɛ Yohanes mɛ menu ɔniliɛ gi enu u, xe amɔ eboa la ya a. Lɛ gi menu u, xe mamɔ na ɛ, madɔ ní kesea ní ɔxwɛdzɛɛ ikli lɛ onu tɔ misù ye ɔniliɛ gi yɛ ɛbasɛ mɛ bidɔ bɛ ya ɛ. 9Pɔ̀ asi mɛ si, “Wukíbitɛ lɛ ɛ, mɛ kyɛ wɔ ɔhanuglɔ ɔnɔsumu menu, mɛ ni wɔ benemi ba beboedoplɛ ba ani banama gi bevu keplekpaa lia ya mɛ eboe la ní awla ɛ. Sù Aya!.”
10Lɛ asi mɛ si, “Wukítsi eboa la gi akpasi ní kuboedoplɛ keplekpaa lia ya onu u, lɛ ese linu si lipoe le lina pɔ́. 11Mlaki si ɔniliɛ gi izɛbitɛ eboe zimizi i, ɔtrɛ ní yɛ eboe zimizi na aʋa a. Mlaki si ɔniliɛ gi izɛbitɛ anyaniboe ɔtrɛ ní yɛ anyaniboe la aʋa a. Mlaki si ɔniliɛ gi yɛ bede ʋa bɛɛgyɔ ɛ, oze ní yɛ kude gyɔgyɔɔ aʋa. Mlaki si ɔniliɛ gi adra ɛ, ɔtrɛ ni yɛ kudradraa aʋa a.”
12“Dike, matraba kpekpemii, lɛ matsini mɛ liʋɛ nɛ ɛmanɔ, lɛ maatsa liʋɛ ki ɔnɔ kakaa ní kidiliɛ gi abitɛ onu u. 13Mɛ menu Alfa ni Omega, Ɔtɔpu yɛ ni Ɔgɔgɔ yɛ, Okpese klɔ ni Ɔgù klɔ.
14“Biakrira banama gi beplo ba ewu la, tɔ biamɔ kude tɔ biaŋa ligbã́ nɛ ose lo lɔ biyoyo ʋe, ani tɔ biaga kuvunu yo tɔ biati uku ní ɔma ʋidi no me e. 15Banama gi balɛ ní ɔma ʋidi no kede e, ba benu kudroʋio, behwinete ba, banama gi bizɛbitɛ enyimeboe ni ádzɛboe, banama gi bizeye banɔ ɔ, banama gi bizesu babu ʋa a, kɔpɔni banama onu gi asia na izeeze ɔgyi i, xe bizɛɛsɛ asia na a.
16“Mɛ Yesu mɛ menu ɔniliɛ gi makpɛ mɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ si obu eboa la ya basɛ wɔ, tɔ wɔaŋa katsalia ki isɔliha lɛ ɛ. Mɛ menu Dawid yɛ ogù no ni yɛ osobi ye ani livlɛ lɛ ɔdzidziobi ye gi eekle e.
17Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ni ɔdzɛɛ gi bɛgbanɔ ɛ, bɛpani si, “Ba!” Lɛ ɔniliɛ gi eenu i, ɔpani si “Ba!” Ɔniliɛ gi olile eeku i, ɔba, ɔniliɛ gi apɛ́ ɛ, ɔzɛ ligbã́ nɛ kuni yo liʋɛmɔtsa.
Ɔgù klɔ
18Mɛɛgba ɔnɔ kakaa gi eenu kuboedoplɛ uliɔ ɔ, gi kulɛ ní keplekpaa lia mɛ si i: xe ɔnutɔ akɔ kiditɔ apɔni eboa la ya ɛ, Aya aakɔ̀ baxixa ʋa su gi bɛŋwlimi bidɔ mɛ ní keplekpaa lia ya mɛ ɛ, aakɔ̀ pɔnɔ ɔki yɛ. 19Lɛ xe ɔnutɔ aabu eboe atɔ ní kuboedoplɛ uliɔ gi kukpasi ní keplekpa lia ya mɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ Aya aabu yɛ ɔŋa klɔ kapɛa dɔni ligbã́ nɛ ose lo ní ɔma dradra lɔ gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní keplekpaa lia ya mɛ ɛ, mɛ.
20Ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛŋa katsalia ɛki eboa la ya ɛ, apani si; “Ee, matraba kpekpemi!” Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ. Ɔkaɛ Yesu ba!
21Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lize ni Aya yɛ banima. Tɔ liba lɛ mɛ.
